g.aria-label: - **Dropped Node 18 support** — the minimum supported version is now Node 20. Upgrade your Node runtime to 20 or later before updating.
g.title: - **Dropped Node 18 support** — the minimum supported version is now Node 20. Upgrade your Node runtime to 20 or later before updating.

g.aria-label: - Added `--watch` to the CLI to regenerate notes on every commit.
g.title: - Added `--watch` to the CLI to regenerate notes on every commit.

g.aria-label: - Large diffs are now streamed instead of buffered in memory, so big repositories work more reliably.
g.title: - Large diffs are now streamed instead of buffered in memory, so big repositories work more reliably.

g.aria-label: - Expired auth tokens are now rejected properly instead of returning a 500 error.
g.title: - Expired auth tokens are now rejected properly instead of returning a 500 error.

g.aria-label: - An empty commit range no longer crashes the tool.
g.title: - An empty commit range no longer crashes the tool.

g.aria-label: - The parsed config is now cached, making startup about 3x faster.
g.title: - The parsed config is now cached, making startup about 3x faster.
